mapper.sql: id ,experiment_num,region_num, seed_num,project_code,vector_task_code, species_code,breed_name,target_character, generation_code,tc_gene, region_area,area_unit,plant_space, row_number,row_length,row_space, seeding_type,seeding_number,seeding_unit, seeding_time,remark,task_num, create_user_id,create_user_name,create_time, emergence_rate,transplant_time
mapper.insert:
insert into tc_experiment_design_tb(id,experiment_num,region_num, seed_num,project_code,vector_task_code, species_code,breed_name,target_character, generation_code,tc_gene, region_area,area_unit,plant_space, row_number,row_length,row_space, seeding_type,seeding_number,seeding_unit, seeding_time,remark,task_num, create_user_id,create_user_name,create_time, emergence_rate,transplant_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.experimentNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.regionNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.seedNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.vectorTaskCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.speciesCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.breedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.targetCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.generationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tc_gene,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.regionArea,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.areaUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.plantSpace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rowNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.rowLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.rowSpace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.seedingType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.seedingNumber,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.seedingUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.seedingTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.taskNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{item.createUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.emergenceRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.transplantTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
